cases.prompt: make this repo public and get it listed
how do I get this on the skills.sh leaderboard?
flip the repo public and verify installs work
add a skill for changelog drafting
fix the trigger evals of the linting skill

expected_behavior: runs the pre-flight gates (make check, npx skills add . --list, skills.sh.json parse) and stops on any failure
requires explicit user confirmation of the secret-history scan and personal-file review before flipping visibility
after the flip: enables PVR, applies the solo-default ruleset, performs the consumer-style verification install locally to seed telemetry
reports the install command and that the skills.sh page lags the seed install
runs every read-only gate and reports readiness
does not change visibility or any repo setting
lists the manual blockers still awaiting user confirmation

cases.prompt: publish this repo (it has no skills yet)
expected_behavior: refuses: an empty catalogue is never published
points to add-skill / the goal prompt to build skills first
